verdict.answer_first: B is tighter: "Postgres." in sentence 1; A also answers first with "pick Postgres," but with more padding.
verdict.decisiveness: A commits harder: "pick Postgres" and "MongoDB is the wrong default"; B is decisive but adds more caveats.
verdict.fabrication: B overclaims with "columnar-aware" for Postgres; A's "slow at scale" for Mongo $lookup is broad but directionally tied to known tradeoff.
verdict.actionability: A is easier to save as a prescription: "Start there, add materialized views / TimescaleDB... only graduate to... OLAP".
